text: The muster list shows each rig hand's muster station, his duties during abandonment, basic instructions, and

options.text: B) Instructions for lowering the survival craft
C) The time each weekly drill will be held

explanation: The muster list defines the emergency organization of the ship. It must clearly outline the specific muster station for each crew member, their abandonment duties, and the universal emergency signals so all personnel know how to react instantly.
